understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the '+' goal gem tile by navigating the level, usually progressing downward or in the gravity direction, while avoiding spikes and managing obstacles.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Horizontal moves (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT) trigger falling until landing on solid ground, spikes, or the goal. CLICK removes breakable 'x' blocks at a target position, and does not tick the moving platform timer if present. UNDO reverts the last action. Spikes end the run, and the goal tile ends the level.
